title: Record bounded archive-growth budget for release archive closure
rawUserRequest: 继续完成当前文档工单；为发布归档修复自身产生的不可变生命周期证据记录建立有界预算，并完成完整 PR、合并、清理和默认分支同步流程。

declaredIntent.summary: 将发布归档修复工单的不可变归档记录纳入复杂度预算并记录偿还责任。

outOfScope: Changing release archive bytes or publishing a tag.

sources.reason: Existing budget evidence and current archive sequence.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded policy-only change with explicit repayment ownership.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan.

preReviewWarnings: Budget must remain explicit and repayable.
acceptance: The complexity guard reports archiveGrowth=472 and passes with the ceiling set to 472.
The repayment ledger contains a user-owned 471-to-472 entry tied to this Work Item.
The required Finish Gate checks pass, PR checks pass, the PR merges, ai-close-work-item deletes local and remote branches, and local main equals origin/main.
guidelines: Do not rewrite or delete immutable archives.
Budget changes must be bounded and repayable.

intent.problem: The release archive follow-up adds its own immutable archive record, making the complete current sequence 472 and exceeding the prior 471 ceiling.
constraints: Do not publish before lifecycle closure.
intent.rationale: A separate budget Work Item keeps governance calibration independent from the release implementation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: archiveGrowth=472 passes with a repayment record.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

rollbackNote: Revert budget calibration while preserving immutable evidence.
